text: The first scene engulfs me in a moment of emptiness—wide, open, almost sterile, with only a single person in the distance. The expanse hints at anticipation or perhaps a lingering sense of loneliness; my mind drifts to questions about purpose and waiting. In contrast, the second scene draws me into vibrancy and curiosity. The vivid wall of 'R+D' pulses with ideas and innovation. Here, I feel stimulated, excited by the promise of new knowledge and the intersection of human minds with technology. The juxtaposition of the two spaces heightens my awareness of how our environments shape our emotional and intellectual responses: one calls for reflection, the other, engagement.
